table.playHint: Tap or use keyboard to play the chords

keyDetector.toggleLabel: Don't know the key? Detect it from chords
keyDetector.experimentalHint: ⚠️ Experimental — best-guess detection for ionian and aeolian modes only
keyDetector.sectionPlaceholder: Section {{n}} chords (e.g. C G Am F)
keyDetector.resultsDisclaimer: Based on chord matching, not a definitive analysis
keyDetector.emptyState: Enter at least one chord to detect a key.

progressions.disclaimer: Not official music theory terms. Names are just what I like to call them / how the progression feels.

tour.rootKeyStep: Tap a note on the keyboard to set the root key. Every chord on the page updates to match.
tour.toggleModesStep: Toggle which modes are shown. Each coloured button is a different musical mode.
tour.playChordStep: Tap any chord to play it. On desktop, you can hold it down to sustain.
tour.keyDetectorStep: Not sure what key you're in? Type a few chords and the detector will guess the key for you.
tour.progressionsStep: Browse chord progressions from real songs, resolved to your current key. Tap one to hear it played back.
